rationale: Wrap the determinism obligation in `assert(P ==> det_push_equal(...)) by { if (P) { ... } }` so the post1_/post2_ ensures are in scope as hypotheses inside the `if`-branch (a bare `assert(forall|v|...)` over post-state ensures-conjuncts is not provable from the requires alone, which is why the prior pattern failed). Inside the branch, line up the two `forall|v|` quantifiers on the common term `pre_self_.get_node_ref(v)` to get pointwise `post1_self_.get_node_ref(v) == post2_self_.get_node_ref(v)` for every `v` in pre_self_, lift the shared view to `=~=`, and surface that `r1`/`r2` are pinned to `post1_/post2_.get_node_ref(new_value)`, giving z3 every handle it needs (modulo the struct-equality the policy demands).
